Name: ENEMY_DEFAULT_LOGIC_PARAM
Description: Defines the default AI logic configuration for enemies, including startup state and hierarchical logic flow between upper and lower behavior modules.

Fields.Name: Initial Character State ID
Fields.Description: State ID used when the character's AI logic is first activated.

Fields.Name: Overall Logic ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the higher-level AI logic module controlling overall behavior.

Fields.Name: Detailed Logic ID
Fields.Description: Identifier for the lower-level AI logic module controlling detailed behavior execution.

Fields.Name: Detailed Logic Start State ID
Fields.Description: Initial state ID used when entering the lower-level logic module.
